creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fixed pretty much everything from last -exp run.

Known-broken with gmake-3.82 are graphics/allegrogl and lang/io -- I =
have absolutely no idea here.

games/secretmaryochronicles is already tagged BROKEN. =
mail/enigmail-seamonkey does not appear to be a gmake-3.82 issue, and =
also depends on www/seamonkey which is marked FORBIDDEN.

New patch:
http://tinderbox.lovett.com/patches/gmake-20110327.diff
SHA256=3D0ff67713b6ae42c0dcca176d5feca0af2b1952953979d796f7a89c85e29a24af

-aDe
